dangerZone.title: Danger zone
dangerZone.changePassword.title: Change password
dangerZone.changePassword.description: Enter your current password and choose a new one.
dangerZone.changePassword.tooShort: Password should be at least 6 characters long
dangerZone.changePassword.success: Your password has been changed successfully
dangerZone.delete.title: Delete account
dangerZone.delete.description: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
dangerZone.delete.dialogIntro: We store the following information about you, and all of it will be permanently deleted:
dangerZone.delete.data.profile: Profile (email, name, username, bio, avatar, website)
